title: Verified Sparse Attention
preview: Introduces formally verified sparse attention patterns that guarantee correctness properties while reducing attention compute for long-context LLMs.
summary: Proposes sparse attention masks derived from formal verification of model behaviour, ensuring that excluded token pairs do not affect output quality above a bounded error threshold. Provides correctness guarantees absent in heuristic sparsity methods like H2O or streaming attention, enabling deployment of sparse attention in safety-critical applications.
datacenter: Relevant to long-context inference infrastructure: verified sparsity enables reproducible and auditable memory reduction, important for regulated enterprise AI deployments. Provides the correctness foundation needed before sparse attention can replace full attention in production.
metrics: Key result signal: formally bounded output divergence from full attention alongside memory and compute reduction factor.
